body:
## Summary

- Fixed `SEP_relieving_letter` notification not being sent for involuntary separations when the HROps Pre-LWD NOC (UK) is completed — the notification was previously gated to voluntary separations only
- Added `forceNotification` flag to `generateRelievingLetter` to allow callers to override the voluntary-only guard without changing the default behaviour for all other flows

## Changes

| Area | File(s) | What changed |
|------|---------|--------------|
| Service | `src/services/separation/generateRelievingLetter.ts` | Added `forceNotification?: boolean` param; notification condition updated to `!skipNotification && (forceNotification \|\| VOLUNTARY)` |
| Route | `src/routes/separation/nocFormsUnified.ts` | `maybeGenerateRelievingLetter` opts type extended with `forceNotification?`; both POST and PUT call sites pass `forceNotification: true` when `type === "hropsPreLwd" && region === "UK"` |
title: Add forceNotification option to generateRelievingLetter
